_comment: Genesis ops for Cairn's own project brain. Cairn eats its own dog food: this batch was applied once with `cairn graph apply .cairn/genesis.json` to seed .cairn/graph.json (and the generated design.md + graph.mmd). It is provenance, not a re-runnable script — re-applying would create duplicate nodes. Update the live brain with `cairn graph add/edge/set` instead.

nodes.title: AI agents that never start from zero
nodes.body: Capture a project's intent as a typed knowledge graph committed to .cairn/, so any fresh, context-free session resumes with full understanding instead of re-interrogating the user.

nodes.title: Persist intent as a typed knowledge graph
nodes.body: Brainstorm output becomes typed nodes and edges in .cairn/graph.json, versioned in git right beside the code.

nodes.title: Resume full context in a fresh session
nodes.body: A context-free agent reads a stable resume brief: goals, accepted decisions, components with their dependencies, open questions, and suggested next actions.

nodes.title: Guarantee test-first builds
nodes.body: Every unit starts from a provably real red — a behavioral assertion that exercised the unit — never a missing-symbol error mistaken for a failing test.

nodes.title: Install missing capabilities on demand
nodes.body: When a request needs a capability Cairn doesn't ship, discover and install the right skill from the open agent-skills ecosystem after checking the built-ins first.

nodes.title: pnpm monorepo, TypeScript strict ESM, Vitest + Biome
nodes.body: One workspace, three packages, strict types, ESM only, no legacy or back-compat shims.

nodes.title: Keep the core engine pure and deterministic
nodes.body: The clock and session id are injected, so identical operations always produce an identical committed graph across machines.

nodes.title: Classify a real red vs a missing-symbol
nodes.body: Precedence is collection -> missing-symbol -> assertion -> pass -> unknown; only a clean assertion counts as a legitimate red to build against.

nodes.title: Studio is a zero-dependency Node server + self-contained HTML wizard
nodes.body: A CSRF-guarded live browser session for brainstorming, with a static wizard fallback for headless environments.

nodes.title: Ship skills on the Vercel `npx skills` open standard
nodes.body: Install with `npx skills add AnkushBL6/cairn@<skill>`; works across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and 18+ agents.

nodes.title: Enforce a typed edge-legality table
nodes.body: An edge is only allowed when its (type, from-type, to-type) triple is semantically valid, so the graph can never encode a nonsensical relationship.

nodes.title: @cairn/core
nodes.body: The pure graph engine: typed nodes/edges, integrity invariants, the Mermaid + design-doc renderers, the resume brief, and the test-failure classifier. Built 100% test-first.

nodes.title: @cairn/studio
nodes.body: Zero-dependency Node server plus a world-class self-contained HTML brainstorming wizard, with a static fallback.

nodes.title: @cairn/cli
nodes.body: The `cairn` command that wires the engine and studio to disk: init, studio, ingest, graph, resume, classify.

nodes.title: Cairn skillpack (six skills)
nodes.body: brainstorm, resume, tdd, frontend, backend, router — each reads the project graph instead of re-interrogating the user.

nodes.title: Marketing website + docs
nodes.body: Production-grade Next.js site (standalone, Lighthouse 99/100/100/100) with docs pages and an interactive graph playground.

nodes.title: Cairn TDD Guard GitHub Action
nodes.body: A reusable composite Action wrapping the classifier so any repository can enforce guaranteed-TDD on pull requests.

nodes.title: Node >= 22, ESM only, no legacy code
nodes.body: Only clean, current code ships — no back-compat shims, no dead paths (noUnusedLocals/Parameters on).

nodes.title: No filesystem or ambient I/O in @cairn/core
nodes.body: All disk I/O lives in the CLI store, so the engine stays pure, deterministic, and trivially testable.

nodes.title: Vercel CLI must be >= 54
nodes.body: The old 39.x used a discontinued login flow that just opened a changelog page; deploy with a modern CLI.

nodes.title: Publish @cairn/* to npm?
nodes.body: Today install is only `npx skills add`; npm publishing would enable `npm i @cairn/core` plus a tagged release pipeline (Changesets).

nodes.title: Host the studio brainstorming wizard online?
nodes.body: A hosted playground would let people try the typed-graph model without installing anything locally.

nodes.title: Classifier drift between core and the Action
nodes.body: The zero-install Action vendors the classifier; without a parity test it can silently diverge from @cairn/core.

nodes.title: Graph schema migrations
nodes.body: GraphDoc is version 1; evolving the node/edge vocabulary will need a migration path so old committed brains still load.

nodes.title: classify-failure unit suite
nodes.body: Locks the precedence and the real-red boundary that the whole guaranteed-TDD promise rests on.

nodes.title: Action <-> core classifier parity test
nodes.body: Feeds a shared corpus to both the Action's vendored classifier and @cairn/core and asserts identical verdicts — kills drift.

nodes.title: The .cairn/ project brain (graph.json)
nodes.body: This very file's output: the committed knowledge graph a fresh session reloads.

nodes.title: Generated design.md + graph.mmd
nodes.body: Human-readable narrative and Mermaid diagram, regenerated from the graph on every save.
